name: Sijin Intelligent Forming Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Sijin Intelligent Forming Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of multi-station high-speed automatic cold forming equipment and die casting equipment in China. It offers cold forging machines, special part and nut formers, nut-former machines, one die two blow headers, and die casting machines. The company is based in Ningbo, China.
